dsl_rule.translation_notes: Entry: Breakout near 12-month low approximated by Donchian lower band breakout with upward close. Exit: Reversal below 20-day SMA as author provided no explicit exit condition. Hold period set to 10 days matching average time to throwback. Stop loss conservatively set to 5% given 39% average rise potential. Pattern success rates (39% without throwback, 33% with throwback) noted but not directly encoded as they represent historical statistics rather than actionable conditions.

source_rule_text: Pattern with breakout near yearly low showing throwback behavior and subsequent rise
